programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: A deputy and his K9 wade through the murky waters of a Georgia swamp to catch a submerged felon; in Louisiana's Cajun country, a suspect escapes into a gator-filled bayou; a man accused of armed robbery takes the plunge, and a deputy dons his heroic cape to save a drowning pup.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: In Florida, troopers risk life and limb wading through gator-infested swamps to track a suspect; a thief in Georgia is close to becoming gator feed to evade capture; a man acting erratically makes a surprising getaway and a gator comes between a woman and her pizza.

programme.title: Crime in Progress
programme.desc: When officers conduct a routine welfare check on a disabled man and his elderly mother in Racine, Wisconsin, they uncover a shocking scene inside the home; what starts as a simple call unravels into a violent, unpredictable chain of events, all captured in real time on body-worn cameras and surveillance video.

programme.title: Crime in Progress
programme.desc: When a woman is stabbed in broad daylight in suburban Michigan, officers launch a manhunt to apprehend the attacker before they strike again.

programme.title: Crime in Progress
programme.desc: When a college student goes missing in suburban Georgia, a bloody discovery triggers an explosive manhunt and a dramatic chase for the truth; every moment is presented through the raw lens of bodycam as the chilling details of the case unfold in real time.

programme.title: Crime in Progress
programme.desc: Body cam and surveillance footage offer a view of high-stakes criminal cases; a routine traffic stop in New Mexico leads to a manhunt when an officer's radio goes silent.

programme.title: Crime in Progress
programme.desc: A young Savannah mother is found shot on a neighbor's doorstep, and detectives uncover a chilling twist: her newborn twins have been abducted by a woman she met in a moms group; Bodycam captures every tense moment as police race against the clock to find the shooter and missing infants.

programme.title: Crime in Progress
programme.desc: When officers in suburban Indiana respond to a potential kidnapping and murder scene, body cam captures every tense moment of the standoff with the suspect.
